house_wood_medium_brown_a.label: Wooden medium house, brown roof
house_wood_medium_brown_a.notes: Strong candidate for generic village housing.

house_wood_medium_brown_b.label: Wooden medium house, brown roof alt
house_wood_medium_brown_b.notes: Very close to asset 002; useful as an alternate house silhouette.

cave_entrance_mossy_a.label: Mossy cave entrance
cave_entrance_mossy_a.notes: Good landmark candidate for mine or starter cave.

house_wood_small_tan_a.label: Small wooden house, tan roof
house_wood_small_tan_a.notes: Useful alternate house with distinct warm roof.

hanging_sign_small_a.label: Small hanging sign
hanging_sign_small_a.notes: Useful for shop entrances or interactable markers.

torch_standing_a.label: Standing torch A
torch_standing_a.notes: Clear silhouette and safe gameplay readability.

fence_diagonal_right_a.label: Diagonal fence right
fence_diagonal_right_a.notes: Pairs well with straight fence sections.

fence_straight_long_a.label: Long straight fence
fence_straight_long_a.notes: Useful larger run for village borders.

torch_standing_b.label: Standing torch B
torch_standing_b.notes: Alternate torch variant for repetition control.

well_stone_wood_a.label: Stone village well
well_stone_wood_a.notes: One of the strongest village props from the set.

weapon_rack_sword_a.label: Sword rack
weapon_rack_sword_a.notes: Strong fit near blacksmith or training area.

forge_clutter_station_a.label: Forge clutter station
forge_clutter_station_a.notes: Useful as blacksmith dressing, though visually busy.

bench_wood_a.label: Wooden bench
bench_wood_a.notes: Clean village prop with clear silhouette.

crates_stacked_double_a.label: Double stacked crates
crates_stacked_double_a.notes: Safe utility prop for stores, docks, or yards.

barrel_small_a.label: Small barrel
barrel_small_a.notes: Good size variation for storage dressing.

notice_board_small_a.label: Small notice board
notice_board_small_a.notes: Useful social-town prop near plaza or NPCs.

signpost_cross_large_a.label: Large cross signpost
signpost_cross_large_a.notes: Useful directional signage for outdoor paths.
